title: Elaphoglossum salicifolium
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum salicifolium belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a species of epiphytic fern within the genus Elaphoglossum. Elaphoglossum salicifolium is a type of vascular plant, classified under the division Pteridophyta. This plant is native to tropical regions and is commonly found in humid environments. Elaphoglossum salicifolium is often associated with other epiphytes, such as orchids and bromeliads.
uses: Elaphoglossum salicifolium has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including treatment of digestive issues and inflammation.
